rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations only when the contract involves visible features or constants from the target scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architectural scope and owner relationships when inserting annex blocks.
Only include assume/guarantee clauses that reference visible identifiers in the target component or implementation.
Avoid inserting AGREE expressions that reference AADL properties as variables unless they are explicitly typed ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must use valid AADL scope and feature names; do not assume implicit variable access.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE clauses referencing AADL timing properties like Deadline or Period as if they were AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
